channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Iran war leaves U.S. gas prices at highest levels in nearly four years ahead of Memorial Day
item.description: Global oil inventories are declining fast with just four to six weeks until gasoline, diesel and jet fuel prices shoot higher, analysts said.

item.title: Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway
item.description: Walmart confirmed to CNBC it has sought a tariff refund and plans to use any money it receives back to invest in lower prices for shoppers.

item.title: Oversight Chairman Comer launches congressional probe into insider trading on Kalshi, Polymarket
item.description: Congress is ramping up pressure on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket over concerns of insider trading.

item.title: U.S., Iran signal peace progress — but remain at odds over enriched uranium, Strait of Hormuz tolls
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday said there were "good signs" that an agreement to end the Middle East conflict is in sight.

item.title: This generator stock will get a boost from the AI infrastructure boom, says Jefferies
item.description: There are ongoing negotiations with multiple hyperscalers for large backup generator supply contracts, Jefferies pointed out.

item.title: Stellantis CEO sees opportunity in growing partnerships, bringing China-branded vehicles to North America
item.description: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa said there could be an opportunity to bring Chinese-branded vehicles into Mexico and potentially Canada, but not the U.S.

item.title: What the AvalonBay, Equity Residential megamerger means for the apartment industry and rents
item.description: The deal will create one of the largest real estate companies in the U.S., with more than 180,000 rental apartments.

item.title: Microsoft’s GitHub was positioned to win the AI coding race. Outages got in the way
item.description: GitHub's user base has swelled under Microsoft's ownership, but the software repository has fallen behind newer rivals in the world of vibe coding.

item.title: NATO will spend hundreds of billions of dollars on defense, says Rutte, as Trump pledges 5,000 American troops to top spender Poland
item.description: "I am pleased to announce that the United States will be sending an additional 5,000 Troops to Poland," Trump said on Truth Social on Thursday.

item.title: Estée Lauder surges in premarket after Puig merger deal talks end
item.description: Estée Lauder's shares jumped before the market opened after talks over a potential merger deal with Spanish beauty group Puig was terminated.

item.title: Oil-rich Alberta to hold a vote on whether to separate from Canada
item.description: The move for a referendum comes after months of campaigning from a group of separatists.

item.title: Donald Trump Jr.-backed 'Steroid Olympics' are happening on Sunday. Here's what to expect
item.description: Olympic medallists are among 42 athletes competing in the controversial competition, but the Enhanced Games has big product plans beyond the event this weekend.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: IMAX, Merck, Estee Lauder & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

item.title: Mega-IPOs could signal market top, say analysts as SpaceX and OpenAI prep record floats
item.description: SpaceX's IPO, expected on June 12, could mark the largest float in history.

item.title: The Cuba situation is starting to resemble a pre-conflict playbook
item.description: The U.S. pressure campaign against Cuba appears to have entered a new phase.

item.title: Eli Lilly says next-generation weight loss drug clears crucial obesity trial
item.description: The results bring Lilly one step closer to filing for approval of the injection, retatrutide, which works differently from existing injections and pills.

item.title: U.S. pushes its AI in China and Asia after Trump-Xi meeting
item.description: Integrating American AI in Asia is high on the agenda for the U.S., according to a senior official for APEC and economic policy.

item.title: Bond yields have been surging. How income-hungry investors can cash in
item.description: A jump in Treasury yields rattled the bond market this week, but the volatility comes with a silver lining for income-seeking investors.

item.title: Crypto bros, scalpers and Logan Paul: Inside the world of Pokémon where cards are sold for millions
item.description: A Pokémon card boom is being driven by nostalgia, blockbuster card sales and speculation.

item.title: How Walmart's gas price warning shapes our retail outlook — plus, Honeywell's quantum connection
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: SpaceX scrubs test flight of massive Starship rocket, will retry Friday
item.description: SpaceX's attempted Starship launch follows the company's release of its IPO prospectus, which set the stage for what's likely to be a record offering.

item.title: What is a tax relief company?
item.description: How tax relief companies work, what they can (and can’t) do, and what to watch out for.

item.title: IMAX has held ‘preliminary talks’ with potential buyers, source says
item.description: IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made directly by the company, a source told CNBC.

item.title: Anthropic, Microsoft in talks for AI chip deal after $5 billion investment
item.description: Microsoft has not made the Maia 200 chips available to customers, but they are used in the company's data centers, offering better efficiency than other silicon.

item.title: Guzman y Gomez shares surge as much as 20% after fast-food chain says it will exit U.S. market
item.description: Guzman y Gomez's shares surged after announcing that it has decided to exit the U.S. market while keeping its Australian business as the main focus

item.title: Workday jumps 14% as it bumps up margin forecast on AI strength
item.description: Workday's CEO says the company is seeing success in artificial intelligence.

item.title: Oura, smart ring maker, files confidentially for IPO
item.description: Oura, the maker of the health and wellness tracking smart ring, has confidentially filed for an IPO with the SEC.

item.title: Trump administration says new EPA rules will save you money at the supermarket. It's not clear they will
item.description: Trump delayed Biden-era EPA refrigerant rules, saying the move will lower grocery costs, though the impact on food prices remains unclear.

item.title: AI spending expected to top $1 trillion in 2 years. That estimate's way too low if Jensen Huang's right
item.description: "The capex is at a trillion dollars, and it's growing toward the three to four [trillion-dollar mark]," said Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang.

item.title: Meta, Broadcom and others to launch $125 million semiconductor research hub at UCLA
item.description: Broadcom, Meta, Applied Materials, GlobalFoundries and Synopsys are joining forces to launch a $125 million "Semiconductor Hub" at UCLA.
